description_long: This is a rounded ceramic cup with a wide opening and a single, curved handle attached to one side. The exterior is adorned with a bold, retro floral pattern in shades of orange, green, and yellow, set against a dark brown background. The floral motifs are large and stylized, with heart-shaped leaves and branches extending around the cup's surface. The handle is also decorated with the same pattern, seamlessly blending into the overall design. The interior of the cup is plain white, providing a clean contrast to the vibrant exterior. The cup has a slightly flared rim and a stable, flat base, making it suitable for holding hot or cold beverages.
description: A rounded ceramic cup with a large, colorful retro floral pattern on a dark brown background and a plain white interior. It features a single curved handle and a wide opening.
description_view_0: The cup is shown from the front, highlighting the handle on the right and the prominent floral pattern with heart motifs.
description_view_1: The handle is now centered, displaying its decorated surface and the continuation of the floral design around the cup.
description_view_2: The back of the cup is visible, showing more of the floral and heart motifs without the handle in view.
description_view_3: The cup is viewed from the opposite side of the handle, focusing on the upper rim and the floral pattern wrapping around the body.
